title: Disclaimer
body1: This calculator is for informational and guidance purposes only. Results are based on the data you enter and the legal regulations in effect at the time this application was created.
authorNote: The application author bears no responsibility for:
li1: The accuracy, completeness, or correctness of the calculations and information provided
li2: Any financial or other damages arising from the use of this calculator
li3: The currency of data given possible changes in legislation
li4: Individual tax and financial situations of users
body2: For accurate information and advice, please consult a qualified tax advisor, accountant, or the relevant tax authority.
agreement: By using this calculator you agree to the above disclaimer.
